comments.title: 🔥流动性修复助推反弹
comments.body: 宏观环境处于流动性修复期。BMRI 数值回升至 78，显著超越 4 月均值 61.32。虽然仍处于 RISK_OFF 状态，但金融条件的边际宽松支撑了 BTC 价格 7 日 2.3% 的涨幅。数据表明，当前反弹动力源于外部宏观预期改善，而非内部资金涌入。偏多。美联储转向是否在即？
comments.body_en: The macro environment is currently in a liquidity repair phase. BMRI has rebounded to 78, significantly outpacing April's average of 61.32. While we remain in RISK_OFF mode, the marginal easing of financial conditions has underpinned BTC’s 7-day gain of 2.3%. Data indicates that current momentum stems from improved external macro expectations rather than internal capital inflows. Leaning bullish. Is the Fed pivot imminent?

comments.title: 🔥资金避险推动吸血行情
comments.body: 市场呈现结构性分化。BTC.D 回升至 60.1%，7 日增长 1.5%，显示资金在反弹中优先拥抱比特币，避险属性强化。当前价格 $78,347 的上涨主要由比特币主导，而非流动性普溢。存量博弈下，山寨币流动性被进一步挤压。行情是反弹还是反转？

comments.title: 🔥周期定位复刻历史底
comments.body: 市场处于周期底部磨底阶段。MVRV 为 1.40，对比上轮周期同期（2022-05）的 1.32，当前估值定位极其接近历史大底。虽价格 7 日回升 2.4%，但仍偏离 200 日定投成本 -11.1%。数据表明市场处于绝望期尾部，具备极高的盈亏比。偏多。黎明前的黑暗还有多久？
comments.body_en: The market is currently grinding at the cycle bottom. MVRV sits at 1.40; compared to 1.32 during the same period of the last cycle (May '22), current valuation is tracking extremely close to the historical macro bottom. Despite a 2.4% 7-day rebound, price is still trading -11.1% below the 200-day DCA cost basis. Data suggests we are at the tail end of the despair phase, offering an asymmetric risk/reward setup. Bullish bias. How much longer before the dawn breaks?

comments.title: 🔥深度低估引发估值修复
comments.body: 市场处于低估修复期。MVRV 为 1.36，数值低于历史上 68% 的时间，且对比 2022 年 5 月的 1.32 优势微弱。当前价格 76,069 美元距 200 日定投成本 86,103 美元仍有 11.7% 的负偏离。这意味着长期持筹者普遍处于浮亏状态，抛压枯竭。偏多。距离回归成本线还有多远？
comments.body_en: The market is in a valuation recovery phase. MVRV sits at 1.36, lower than 68% of historical data, with only a slight edge over the 1.32 seen in May 2022. At $76,069, price remains 11.7% below the 200-day DCA cost basis of $86,103. This implies that long-term holders are largely underwater, leaving sell-side pressure exhausted. Leaning Bullish. How far until we reclaim the cost basis?

comments.title: 🔥宏观风险压制反弹高度
comments.body: 市场处于筑底修复期。BMRI 读数 78（RISK_OFF），表明宏观流动性环境未改善。受油价下跌影响，BTC 价格 7 日回升 4.4% 至 74,347 美元，但仍处于 200 日定投成本 86,327 美元下方，偏离达 13.9%。资金在强阻力区前依然谨慎。降息预期是否已过度交易？
comments.body_en: The market is in a bottoming and repair phase. BMRI sits at 78 (RISK_OFF), signaling that macro liquidity conditions haven't improved. BTC rebounded 4.4% over the last 7 days to $74,347, helped by falling oil prices, but it still trades 13.9% below the 200-day DCA cost of $86,327. Capital remains cautious ahead of strong resistance. Have rate cut expectations been over-traded?

comments.title: 🔥存量博弈，BTC主导格局未变
comments.body: 市场处于典型的存量博弈阶段，资金结构向比特币倾斜。BTC.D 数据录得 59.2%，7 日变化为 +0.5%。尽管近期价格波动，但持续处于 59% 上方的指标意味着资金并未流向山寨币，市场流动性依旧紧缩并集中于头部资产。这种结构下，山寨币难以启动独立行情。资金外溢信号何时出现？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Zero-sum game, BTC dominance remains unchanged
comments.body_en: The market is in a typical zero-sum game phase, with capital structure tilting towards Bitcoin. BTC.D sits at 59.2%, with a 7-day change of +0.5%. Despite recent volatility, the indicator holding above 59% means capital is not flowing into altcoins; market liquidity remains tight and concentrated in top-tier assets. Under this structure, altcoins struggle to launch independent rallies. When will the capital spillover signal appear?

comments.title: 🔥周期坐标重演22年深熊
comments.body: 市场处于深度熊市筑底期。AHR999(3D)报0.45，精准对应2022年6月均值0.44的历史极值。尽管指标7日反弹13.1%，但当前所处的时间节点与上轮周期底部高度重合。数据证实市场已完成深度出清，周期反转只需耐心等待。谁能熬过最后的至暗时刻？
comments.title_en: 🔥Cyclical Coordinates Reenact the '22 Deep Bear Market
comments.body_en: The market is in the deep bear market bottoming phase. AHR999 (3D) sits at 0.45, precisely matching the historical extreme of 0.44 from June 2022. Despite a 13.1% 7-day rebound, the current timeline heavily overlaps with the previous cycle's bottom. Data confirms the market flush is complete; the cycle reversal just requires patience. Who can survive the final darkest hour?

comments.title: 🔥周期估值回撤至22年深渊
comments.body: 市场处于周期性底部磨底阶段。MVRV读数为1.37，与2022年5月同期的1.32高度趋同，且低于历史上68%的时间。数据显示当前筹码估值已回归至上轮熊市的极寒区域，市场整体处于深度亏损状态。周期底部的确定性正在增加，耐心等待流动性转向。这是否意味着长线买点已现？

comments.title: 🔥宏观风险压制反弹空间
comments.body: 市场受宏观流动性压制，处于弱势筑底阶段。BMRI指标读数为73，深陷RISK_OFF区间，表明资金风险偏好极低。尽管BTC周内反弹5.8%，但若无外部流动性注入，涨势难以为继。当前走势高度依赖油价表现，只有降息预期重燃，才能打开上行空间。短期维持中性。美联储会转向吗？
comments.body_en: The market is weighed down by macro liquidity, stuck in a weak bottoming process. BMRI reads 73, deep in the RISK_OFF zone, signaling rock-bottom risk appetite. Despite BTC's 5.8% weekly bounce, this rally is unsustainable without an external liquidity injection. Price action is currently tied to oil; we won't see meaningful upside until rate cut expectations reignite. Neutral stance in the short term. Will the Fed pivot?

comments.title: 🔥存量资金加速回流大饼
comments.body: 市场处于流动性虹吸状态。BTC.D触及59.1%，7日激增1.9%。尽管BTC价格较200日成本倒挂16.9%，但资金选择逃离山寨币而非抄底。数据显示，这并非增量资金推动的普涨，而是存量博弈下的避险轮动。山寨币正在失血，市场极度厌恶风险。这种二八分化还要持续多久？
comments.title_en: 🔥 Liquidity is aggressively rotating back into BTC
comments.body_en: The market is caught in a liquidity siphon. BTC.D hit 59.1%, surging 1.9% in just 7 days. Despite BTC trading at a 16.9% discount to the 200-day cost basis, capital is choosing to flee alts rather than buy the dip. The data makes it clear: this isn't an across-the-board rally driven by new inflows, but a risk-off rotation within existing liquidity. Alts are bleeding out, and risk aversion is at an extreme. How much longer will this divergence last?

comments.title: 🔥估值跌入历史极值区间
comments.body: 市场处于深度筑底阶段。AHR999为0.40处于抄底区，价格较200日成本$88,080倒挂17.2%。MVRV仅1.33，低于历史71%的时间，且持平于2022年5月。核心指标共振显示筹码已极度低估，具备高赔率特征。这是黎明前的至暗时刻吗？
